mapper.select: select * from borrow order by id asc
mapper.update: update borrow set book_no= #{bookNo},book_name= #{bookName},user_name= #{userName},user_id= #{userId},user_phone= #{userPhone},score= #{score},updatetime= #{updatetime},status= #{status},return_date= #{returnDate},days= #{days} where id= #{id}
mapper.select:
/*DATE_FORMAT(createtime, '%Y-%m-%d')把datetime类型的数据格式化成yyyy-MM-dd*/ select count(id) as count, DATE_FORMAT(createtime, '%Y-%m-%d') as date from
borrow
retur
where
createtime >= DATE_SUB(NOW(),INTERVAL 1 WEEK) /* --DATE_SUB 就是数据库进行时间计算的函数*/
createtime >= DATE_SUB(NOW(),INTERVAL 1 MONTH)
createtime >= DATE_SUB(NOW(),INTERVAL 3 MONTH)
createtime >= DATE_SUB(NOW(),INTERVAL 12 MONTH)
createtime > now()
group by date
mapper.update: update borrow set return_date= DATE_ADD(return_date, INTERVAL #{extendDays} DAY),updatetime= #{updatetime} where id= #{id}
